blocker: MiMo V2.5 spacing/syntax/upcast/quantization/cache artifact contract for speed and remake decision

cache_findings.classification: MiMo cache type is architecture-native mixed full/SWA; generic TurboQuant KV is intentionally disabled and is not the right speed fix for this family

model_file_remake_guidance: For a high-speed 128GB release artifact, remake/prefer MiMo JANGTQ_2-style prestacked TurboQuant routed experts with tq_packed/tq_norms present for switch_mlp projections.
Keep the current chat template and tokenizer spacing contract; the inspected artifacts have matching template hash and sane spacing flags.

Keep lm_head and embed_tokens q8/group64 packed bookends unless a separate logits-kernel optimization or lower-bit lm_head quality proof is available; current headers are shape-correct, not malformed.
Reduce attention/qkv footprint where quality permits: JANGTQ_2 layer0 qkv packed shape is [13568,512] while classic JANG_2L is [13568,1024].
Do not remake solely to change cache metadata: native mixed full/SWA cache is the correct runtime cache type; generic TQ-KV would violate the RotatingKVCache metadata contract.

If remaking classic JANG_2L specifically, the target is a model-file layout problem for speed/headroom, not a whitespace/syntax repair: add accelerated routed-expert layout or accept classic affine JANG_2L as slow.
not_proven: This does not prove model quality/exactness is inherent; that still needs source/dequant/logit comparison or a replacement artifact A/B.
This does not prove current installed-app speed after rebuild; it classifies artifact contracts and prior traces.
This does not clear media, audio/video, full tool loops, or release readiness.

quantization_layout_delta.classification: classic JANG_2L is not corrupt, but it is a slow affine stacked-expert layout: no TurboQuant routed expert tensors, larger attention packed width, and about 25.5GB more model footprint than JANGTQ_2

spacing_syntax_findings.classification: no artifact-level spacing/template delta between JANG_2L and JANGTQ_2 found

upcast_dtype_findings.classification: no header evidence of text-core BF16 upcast failure for inspected hot path; lm_head packed shape expands correctly to hidden_size 4096 at q8/group64
